prompt: Run /create-spec with this feature description: We need a customer support inbox for our B2B SaaS. Agents should see all incoming emails, assign tickets to themselves, set status (open/pending/resolved), add internal notes, and reply to customers from the same view. We also need SLA tracking with alerts before breach, but only for enterprise accounts. Keep v1 web-only.
assertions: Spec contains all mandatory sections: User Scenarios & Testing, Requirements, Success Criteria, Assumptions
Spec has at least 8 functional requirements
Spec has at least 3 measurable success criteria
Checklist exists and has no unchecked items
